The empty watchlist is structural: premarket_scan.py (Alpaca IEX feed) defines rel_vol as today's cumulative daily-bar volume / prior full trading day's volume, which can rarely exceed the 1.5x bar intraday, and the gap-up gate compounds it. This needs a code maintenance fix (e.g. minute-bar relvol vs. time-of-day baseline, or relaxed rel_vol/gap thresholds), not another re-run -- flag for a maintenance session.
